name: Cash For Gold
description_short: Dallas Gold & Silver Exchange buys and sells precious metals, fine jewelry, luxury watches, and bullion across 7 North Texas locations with 40+ years of experience.
description_long:
Dallas Gold & Silver Exchange (DGSE) has operated as a precious metals and jewelry dealer in the North Texas region for over four decades. The company positions itself as an authenticator and reseller of luxury goods rather than a traditional pawn shop, emphasizing verification and trust in every transaction. DGSE operates seven physical locations across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex including Dallas, Frisco, Grand Prairie, Grapevine, Lewisville, Euless, and Fort Worth. Their core business model involves purchasing items from customers at below-market rates and reselling them, similar to pawn operations but focused on higher-value luxury goods. DGSE explicitly states: "We don't pay full price so neither should you," acknowledging their margin-based business structure.

The company offers buying and selling services across four primary categories: fine jewelry (including engagement rings and wedding bands), luxury watches and timepieces, gold and silver bullion, and jewelry and watch repair services. They claim to authenticate all items and reject counterfeits, positioning authenticity as a core differentiator. Customers can bring items for appraisal, receive cash offers, or explore trade-in options for alternative merchandise. The repair services include jewelry restoration and watch polishing and maintenance.

DGSE differentiates itself through longevity, local community involvement, and hands-on service. Customer testimonials highlight friendly staff, transparent appraisal processes, and proactive quality control (one review noted staff identifying and replacing a missing bezel without being asked). The company claims to support environmental causes and community organizations in the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Their marketing emphasizes expertise, authentication rigor, and building long-term customer relationships rather than transactional volume.

As a precious metals and jewelry buyer, DGSE serves a legitimate financial function for consumers liquidating assets, but operates with the inherent margin structure of any reseller—customers receive less than retail or full market value. The company is geographically limited to North Texas, making it inaccessible to non-local consumers. No information is provided about licensing, insurance, or regulatory compliance, and the site lacks transparency regarding appraisal methodologies, pricing formulas, or dispute resolution processes. This remains a buy-low, sell-high business model, not a financing solution.
pros: 40+ years of operating history and local reputation in North Texas
Multiple locations (7 across DFW) providing geographic accessibility for local customers
Explicit authentication and counterfeit-rejection policy emphasized on website
Offers both buying/selling AND repair services (jewelry and watch repair) in-house
Customer testimonials highlight proactive quality control and staff expertise
Free appraisals and transparent valuation process described in reviews
Trade-in options available on items customers choose not to sell for cash
cons: Customers receive significantly less than retail value (company explicitly states they 'don't pay full price')
Geographically limited to 7 North Texas locations only—no online shipping or national service
No published pricing formula, authentication standards, or appraisal methodology documented on website
No information about insurance, licensing, regulatory compliance, or dispute resolution process
Standard pawn-shop margin structure means liquidity for customers comes at substantial discount
best_for: North Texas residents needing immediate cash for unwanted luxury watches, fine jewelry, or bullion
Consumers seeking to liquidate inherited jewelry or engagement rings for cash value
Local customers needing jewelry or watch repair services combined with potential resale options
Bullion investors or precious metals holders looking for local authentication and buyback
diagnosis: DGSE is best for North Texas residents who own luxury watches, fine jewelry, or bullion and need immediate local liquidity, understanding they will receive 30-50% below retail value in exchange. The main caveat is that this is not a financing product—it's an asset sale with built-in markdown, and the lack of published standards or online service limits accessibility and price transparency.
services: Gold and silver bullion buying and selling
Engagement ring and wedding band buying and selling
Luxury watch and timepiece buying and selling
Trade-in options for jewelry and metals
